title: Session delete reports missing IDs clearly
description: Black-box smoke for `orca session delete <id>` when no matching saved session exists.
input: Run `orca session delete missing` in an isolated empty ORCA_HOME and verify the command reports the missing session id with exit code 1.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_ROOT/home"; OUTPUT=$(env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home" ORCA_HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca" node dist/bin/orca.js session delete missing 2>&1; STATUS=$?; printf "status=%s
%s
" "$STATUS" "$OUTPUT"); printf "%s
" "$OUTPUT"; printf "%s" "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "status=1"'
